title: 2025-08-21 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 19.01
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-08-21: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 19.01/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-08-21, the score printed 19.01/100 in the low regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
